title: Map a Agriculture & Food Systems system
description: Choose one real food system or agricultural resilience problem and explain it using the field's core models, tradeoffs, and operator reality.
whyItMatters: This project forces Agriculture & Food Systems to become operational rather than remaining purely conceptual.

steps.title: Choose a live case
steps.description: Select a concrete food system or agricultural resilience problem with visible constraints and decisions.

steps.title: Map the system
steps.description: Use Agriculture & Food Systems Systems Map to capture the main units, flows, and constraints.

steps.title: Analyze the tradeoffs
steps.description: Use Agriculture & Food Systems Tradeoff Lens to compare the main options or tensions.

steps.title: Write the brief
steps.description: Summarize what is happening, why it matters, and what a better decision would look like.

deliverables: A list of key tradeoffs and uncertainties

rubric.description: The system and its boundaries are clearly explained.
The key tensions are real, specific, and well compared.
The analysis stays grounded in real constraints and operators.
